# LedoLab - Marketing & Digital Agency
# https://ledolab.online

> LedoLab is a performance marketing agency based in Burgas, Bulgaria.
> Founded by Denis Ledovskoy, 10+ years of experience in Europe, USA, and CIS.
> Specializing in systematic marketing, Facebook/Google/TikTok Ads, SEO, CRM integrations.
> $1,500,000+ managed ad spend. 100+ clients. 5.0 rating on Google (56 reviews).

## Services
- Growth Starter System (€400/month): 1 traffic source, 1 funnel, basic analytics
- Growth System (€800/month): 2 traffic sources, 2-3 funnels, cross-platform analytics
- Growth Full System Enterprise (€1500/month): all sources, 5+ funnels, full CRM/ERP/BI

## Key Results
- 1,547,668 RON revenue in 6 months (auto e-commerce)
- $0 to $118,000 in 90 days (sports accessories)
- 969% ROAS (auto literature)
- 3,000+ leads across 14 markets (SaaS AgriTech)
- 5x conversion rate growth (cosmetics)
- 33,000+ app installs at $0.22 CPI (car rental)
- 3.5x Black Friday sales (Kasta marketplace)
